title: Behavior Look At Entity
description: Allows the mob to look at nearby entities.

angle_of_view_horizontal.description: Horizontal field of view, in degrees, used to detect targets.

angle_of_view_vertical.description: Vertical field of view, in degrees, used to detect targets.

filters.description: Filter to determine which entities to look at.

look_distance.description: Maximum distance in blocks at which the entity will look.

oneOf.description: Range [min, max] of look time in seconds.

look_time.description: Time in seconds the entity will look.

probability.description: Probability of triggering the look behavior each tick.
